The Mountain Between Us (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $30,348,555Details
International Box Office $32,268,992
Worldwide Box Office $62,617,547
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,011,351
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,366,810
Total $5,378,161
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A pair survive a plane crash in the mountains where they are forced to trust each other and find safety while badly injured.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,551,336 (34.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.88 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,088 opening theaters/3,259 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $40,464,734

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 6th, 2017 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: October 6th, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 6th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 6th, 2017 (Wide), released as Hora mezi námi (Czech Republic)
October 6th, 2017 (Wide) (Slovakia)
October 6th, 2017 (Wide), released as La Montaña entre nosotros (Spain)
Video Release: December 19th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for a scene of sexuality, peril, injury images, and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2492 (Cert #50989), 9/6/2017)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Plot point: Accidental Death, Animals Gone Bad, Marooned, Mountain Climbing, Plane Crash, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Survivalist, Trapped, Extreme Weather, Widow/Widower
Social setting: In a Plane
Subgenre: Survival Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Chernin Entertainment, Fox 2000 Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
